text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Commander of U.S. Central Command Admiral Brad Cooper said that less than six weeks after launching Operation Epic Fury, the United States has dismantled Iran’s ability to project power beyond its borders. “Iran has suffered a generational military defeat,” he stated. “The United States and Israel systematically destroyed Iran’s ability to conduct large‑scale military operations for years to come. Iran’s conventional military capability, built over 40 years at the cost of billions of dollars, has been eliminated.” Cooper noted that more than 13,000 strikes were conducted on Iranian military targets. U.S. forces have paused offensive operations under the ceasefire but remain vigilant. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀上将表示，在启动“史诗狂怒”行动不到六周后，美国已瓦解伊朗在其境外投射力量的能力。他声称：“伊朗遭受了一代人的军事失败。”“美国和以色列系统性地摧毁了伊朗未来数年进行大规模军事行动的能力。伊朗耗资数百亿美元、历经40多年建立的常规军事能力已被消除。”库珀指出，针对伊朗军事目标实施了超过13,000次打击。美军已在停火协议下暂停进攻行动，但仍保持警惕。@wfwitness

text: 🇬🇧 🇷🇺 Recently, the Telegraph published a report titled, "Putin mocks Starmer with a warship in the English channel" saying that, even though Starmer announced that the military have authorisation to board Russian shadow fleet oil tankers in UK waters, this has not happened – and does not seem to be happening in this case. But Healey today has implied that the fact that Russia feels the need to send a warship to escort its shadow fleet vessels has shown the new UK policy is “having an impact” because it is making it much more difficult for Putin to sell oil using these tankers. Talk about cope 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇬🇧 🇷🇺 近日，《电讯报》发表题为“普京以英吉利海峡战舰嘲讽斯塔默”的报道称，尽管斯塔默宣布军方已获授权在英国水域登检俄罗斯影子舰队油轮，但此事尚未发生——且在此案例中似乎也不会发生。不过，希利今日暗示，俄罗斯认为有必要派遣战舰护送其影子舰队船只，这一事实表明英国的新政策“正在产生影响”，因为这使得普京利用这些油轮销售石油的难度大大增加。真是自我安慰 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 🤡 🇺🇸 Another Explosive Media LEGO just dropped. 🐻 These kids are due several awards nomination for their AI-slop, including Nobel, Pulitzer and hip hop Grammys. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🤡 🇺🇸 又一爆炸性媒体乐高刚刚抛出。🐻 这些孩子因其AI垃圾作品理应获得多项奖项提名，包括诺贝尔奖、普利策奖和嘻哈格莱美奖。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 💬 🇪🇺 The US is ramping up pressure on European allies to take a military role in the Strait of Hormuz. According to Der Spiegel, NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte has informed European capitals that Trump expects concrete commitments within days—such as sending warships or other military assets. General political statements are no longer considered sufficient. European diplomats say Trump’s demand amounts to an ultimatum following his meeting with Rutte. Germany has indicated general willingness to join a mission, but only under conditions such as a UN mandate and either a lasting ceasefire or a negotiated truce. Beyond Hormuz, Trump is also reportedly pressuring NATO allies with threats. US media say he is compiling a list of European countries that supported or opposed him in his war on Iran, with possible US troop withdrawals from “uncooperative” allies. Spain is mentioned as a key case after refusing overflight rights for US military aircraft. Germany, meanwhile, has placed no restrictions on US bases, but Trump is said to view Berlin as unsupportive because of political messaging describing the conflict as “not our war”—a quote attributed to Defense Minister Boris Pistorius, though it was reportedly misattributed in Washington to Chancellor Friedrich Merz. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 💬 🇪🇺 美国正加大对欧洲盟友的压力，要求其在霍尔木兹海峡承担军事角色。据《明镜周刊》报道，北约秘书长马克·吕特已告知欧洲各国首都，特朗普期望在数日内得到具体承诺——例如派遣战舰或其他军事资产。一般的政治声明不再被视为足够。欧洲外交官表示，特朗普的要求相当于在与吕特会晤后发出的最后通牒。德国已表示原则上愿意加入任务，但前提是获得联合国授权，并实现持久停火或谈判达成的休战。除霍尔木兹海峡外，据报道特朗普还以威胁手段向北约盟友施压。美国媒体称，他正在编制一份欧洲国家名单，记录在伊朗战争中对他的支持或反对，并可能从“不合作”的盟友撤出美军。西班牙因拒绝美军飞机过境权被列为关键案例。与此同时，德国未对美军基地施加限制，但据称特朗普认为柏林方面不够支持，因其政治言论将冲突描述为“不是我们的战争”——这句话虽被归因于国防部长鲍里斯·皮斯托留斯，但在华盛顿被误传为总理弗里德里希·默茨所说。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 Lebanese President Joseph Aoun: No one negotiates on our behalf, and we do not want anyone to negotiate for us—this is something we will not accept. We are in contact with our friends, demanding a ceasefire and a return to negotiations.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩：无人代表我们谈判，我们也不希望任何人替我们谈判——这是我们无法接受的。我们正与友邦保持联系，要求停火并重返谈判。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇮🇱 Fars News Agency: The IRGC shot down an Hermes 900 drone in the skies of Lar, Fars province. The military warned that any aircraft entering Iranian airspace, even without conducting military operations, will be considered a ceasefire violation and…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 The IRGC has released footage of what they claim is an interception of an Israeli Hermes 900 over the Fars province. This is likely the interception reported yesterday. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇮🇱 法尔斯通讯社：伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队在法尔斯省拉尔上空击落一架赫尔墨斯900无人机。军方警告，任何进入伊朗领空的飞机，即使未执行军事行动，也将被视为违反停火协议，且…” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队发布了据称是在法尔斯省拦截以色列赫尔墨斯900无人机的画面。这很可能就是昨日报道的拦截事件。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 Lebanese Army announced that a specialised army unit has fully reopened the Al‑Qasimiyah sea bridge, in coordination with civil defence and local associations. One unit has been deployed around the bridge to prevent Israeli airstrikes. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 黎巴嫩军队宣布，一支专业部队已与民防及地方协会协调，全面重新开放了阿尔卡西米耶海桥。一支部队已部署在桥周围，以防以色列空袭。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel The UAE Ministry of Defence confirms airspace remains clear of threats in recent hours. No ballistic missiles, cruise missiles, or UAVs detected on 9 April 2026. Since Iranian attacks began, air defences have intercepted 537 ballistic missiles, 26 cruise missiles, and 2,256 UAVs. No new injuries or fatalities; total injuries remain at 224, involving multiple nationalities. Civilian deaths total 10, plus 2 martyrs and one Moroccan contractor. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 阿联酋国防部确认，最近几小时空域保持无威胁状态。2026年4月9日未检测到弹道导弹、巡航导弹或无人机。自伊朗攻击开始以来，防空系统已拦截537枚弹道导弹、26枚巡航导弹和2,256架无人机。无新增伤亡；总受伤人数维持在224人，涉及多国国籍。平民死亡总数10人，另有2名烈士和一名摩洛哥承包商。推文

text: Faytuks News RT @FaytuksNetwork : BREAKING: President Trump has set a deadline for European allies to provide concrete military support in the Strait of Hormuz, including the deployment of warships, Der Spiegel reports. NATO Secretary-General Mark Rutte informed European countries that political pledges made since the start of the conflict are no longer sufficient. tweet
text_zh: Faytuks新闻 RT @FaytuksNetwork : 突发：据《明镜周刊》报道，特朗普总统已为欧洲盟友设下最后期限，要求其在霍尔木兹海峡提供具体军事支持，包括部署军舰。北约秘书长马克·吕特告知欧洲各国，自冲突开始以来所作的政治承诺已不再足够。推文

text: Open Source Intel An Israeli official reports key figures from Operation Roaring Lion: 36,000 munitions fired vs. 3,700 in Operation Rising Lion, nearly tenfold increase. 1,200 of 2,500 ballistic missiles destroyed or launched, crippling production capacity. 220 terrorists killed in Lebanon yesterday, most of them commanders. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 一名以色列官员报告了“咆哮雄狮行动”的关键数据：发射了36,000枚弹药，而“崛起雄狮行动”中为3,700枚，增加了近十倍。2,500枚弹道导弹中有1,200枚被摧毁或发射，严重削弱了生产能力。昨日在黎巴嫩有220名恐怖分子被击毙，其中大部分为指挥官。推文

text: OSINTdefender A U.S. Navy MQ-4C "Triton" high-altitude, long-endurance maritime reconnaissance drone appears to have descended into the Persian Gulf after squawking 7400 (communications link loss) and then 7700 (general emergency) while it was returning to Naval Air Station Sigonella, Italy, following a mission over the Strait of Hormuz. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 一架美国海军MQ-4C“特里同”高空长航时海上侦察无人机在完成霍尔木兹海峡任务后返回意大利锡戈内拉海军航空站途中，先发出7400代码（通信链路丢失），随后发出7700代码（一般紧急情况），似乎已坠入波斯湾。推文

text: OSINTdefender According to the Lebanese Army, yesterday, 4 Lebanese soldiers were killed in Southern Lebanon following Israeli strikes. First Sergeant Hussein Khaled Yassin, Cadet Ali Nasser al-Din, Conscript Ali Hassan Qasim, and First Soldier Muhammad Bassam Shahhitli were identified in the release. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据黎巴嫩军方称，昨日在以色列袭击后，黎巴嫩南部有4名士兵丧生。公告中确认了以下人员：一级中士侯赛因·哈立德·亚辛、学员阿里·纳赛尔·丁、应征士兵阿里·哈桑·卡西姆以及一等兵穆罕默德·巴萨姆·沙希特利。推文

text: OSINTtechnical Only a single tanker has passed through the Strait of Hormuz over the last 24 hours -Reuters. An additional 5 dry bulk carriers made the transit. tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 路透社报道，过去24小时内仅有一艘油轮通过霍尔木兹海峡，另有5艘散货船完成了通行。推文

text: Open Source Intel UK Defense Secretary reports 3 Russian submarines in UK waters and warns Putin: "To President Putin I say, we see you, we see your activity over our cables and our pipelines, and you should know that any attempt to damage them will not be tolerated and will have serious consequences." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 英国国防大臣报告称有3艘俄罗斯潜艇出现在英国水域，并向普京发出警告：“普京总统，我要说的是，我们看到你了，我们看到你在我们的电缆和管道上方的活动，你应该知道，任何破坏它们的企图都不会被容忍，并将带来严重后果。”推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 Iran's Parliament Speaker, Ghalibaf: '1- Lebanon and the entire Resistance Axis, as Iran's allies, form an inseparable part of the ceasefire. (Point 1, 10-point proposal) 2- PM Shehbaz Sharif publicly and clearly stressed the Lebanon issue; there is no room for denial and backtracking. 3- Ceasefire violations carry explicit costs and STRONG responses. Extinguish the fire immediately.' tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 新 🔴 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫表示：‘1- 作为伊朗的盟友，黎巴嫩及整个抵抗轴心是停火不可分割的一部分。（十点提案中的第一点）2- 总理夏巴兹·谢里夫公开且明确地强调了黎巴嫩问题；没有否认和退缩的余地。3- 违反停火将承担明确代价和强烈回应。立即扑灭火势。’推文

text: France has officially dropped funding for the multinational Eurodrone program in its updated 2024–2030 military spending plan, effectively ending its participation. The decision follows years of delays, rising costs, and concerns that the large, twin-engine MALE drone is too expensive and vulnerable for modern high-intensity warfare. Source: AeroTime
text_zh: 法国在其更新的2024-2030年军事支出计划中，正式取消了对多国欧洲无人机项目的资助，实质上结束了其参与。这一决定源于多年的延迟、成本上升以及担忧这款大型双引擎中高空长航时无人机过于昂贵且在现代高强度战争中易受攻击。来源：AeroTime

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 The commander of the IRGC ground forces Mohammad Karami said a multi‑layered national defence has been prepared for Iran, with a decentralised structure and asymmetric approach that makes war hard and uncontrollable for the enemy. He described Iran’s geography as a prison and swamp for any ground invader, citing the "failed US‑CIA special operations mission" in Isfahan that involved over 500 personnel and cost nearly one billion dollars. More than 17 million volunteers have declared readiness alongside military and Basij forces. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队地面部队指挥官穆罕默德·卡拉米表示，伊朗已准备就绪一套多层次国防体系，采用分散结构和不对称策略，使战争对敌人而言变得艰难且不可控。他将伊朗的地理描述为任何地面入侵者的监狱和沼泽，并提及在伊斯法罕的“失败的美中情局特种作战任务”，该任务涉及超过500名人员，耗资近十亿美元。已有超过1700万志愿者宣布准备与军队和巴斯基部队并肩作战。@wfwitness

text: CENTCOM Commander Brad Cooper: Iran has suffered a generational military defeat.
text_zh: 美国中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀：伊朗遭受了一代人的军事失败。

text: A Pakistani source said Pakistan is working on potential ceasefires for Lebanon and Yemen: It will ⁠be discussed during the (upcoming) talks and we will settle it. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 巴基斯坦消息人士称，巴基斯坦正在为黎巴嫩和也门探讨可能的停火协议：这将在（即将举行的）会谈中讨论，我们将解决此事。来源：路透社

text: ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 A US Navy maritime patrol MQ-4C drone may have crashed at around 10h15 UTC in the Persian gulf. After a routine patrol over the strait of Hormuz the drone headed back to its base in Italy. The drone then declared emergency and turned to the gulf while losing altitude. The signal was then lost. The drone might have suffered an engine failure and the operators chose to crash it on the sea rather than over potentially populated areas. FlightRadar24 data is not enough in itself to confidently assess the fate of the drone. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 一架美国海军海上巡逻MQ-4C无人机可能于UTC时间约10点15分在波斯湾坠毁。在完成对霍尔木兹海峡的例行巡逻后，无人机返回其在意大利的基地。随后无人机宣布紧急情况并转向海湾，同时高度下降。信号随后丢失。无人机可能遭遇发动机故障，操作员选择将其坠毁在海域，而非可能的人口密集区上空。FlightRadar24数据本身不足以自信评估无人机的命运。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Lebanon’s Foreign Minister Youssef Rajji told Al-Jadeed as he left the cabinet meeting that there is great anger at Israel for killing civilians, as well as anger at those who hide among civilians and caused what happened. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 黎巴嫩外交部长优素福·拉吉在离开内阁会议时告诉Al-Jadeed，对于以色列杀害平民的行为感到极大愤怒，同时对那些藏身于平民之中并导致事件发生的人也表示愤怒。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian said the renewed Israeli aggression against Lebanon is a flagrant violation of the initial ceasefire agreement and a dangerous sign of deceit and lack of commitment to potential accords. “The continuation of these actions will render negotiations meaningless. Our hands remain on the trigger. Iran will never leave its Lebanese brothers and sisters alone,” he wrote. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 伊朗总统马苏德·佩泽什基安表示，以色列对黎巴嫩的新侵略公然违反了初步停火协议，是欺骗和缺乏对潜在协议承诺的危险信号。他写道：“这些行动的持续将使谈判变得毫无意义。我们的手仍扣在扳机上。伊朗永远不会让其黎巴嫩兄弟姐妹孤军奋战。”@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Lebanese Army Commander General Rodolph Haykal visited the Tyre barracks and met with senior officers of the South Litani sector command. He also inspected the Qasmiyeh bridge, which was targeted by Israeli airstrikes overnight. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩军队指挥官鲁道夫·海卡尔将军访问了提尔军营，并会见了南利塔尼区指挥部的高级军官。他还视察了夜间遭以色列空袭的卡西米耶桥。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 Iranian President Pazeshkian: “The repeated attacks by the Zionist entity on Lebanon constitute a blatant violation of the initial ceasefire agreement and a dangerous indication of deception and lack of commitment to potential agreements. Continuing these attacks will render negotiations meaningless; our hands will remain on the trigger, and Iran will never abandon its Lebanese brothers and sisters.” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗总统佩泽什基安：“犹太复国主义实体对黎巴嫩的反复攻击公然违反了初步停火协议，是欺骗和缺乏对潜在协议承诺的危险迹象。继续这些攻击将使谈判变得毫无意义；我们的手将始终放在扳机上，伊朗永远不会抛弃其黎巴嫩兄弟姐妹。”🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian: The repeated aggression by the Zionist entity against Lebanon is a flagrant violation of the initial ceasefire agreement and a dangerous indicator of deceit and lack of commitment to potential accords. The continuation of these aggressions will render negotiations meaningless; our hands will remain on the trigger, and Iran will never abandon its Lebanese brothers and sisters.
text_zh: 伊朗总统马苏德·佩泽什基安：犹太复国主义实体对黎巴嫩的反复侵略公然违反了初步停火协议，是欺骗和缺乏对潜在协议承诺的危险指标。这些侵略的持续将使谈判变得毫无意义；我们的手将始终放在扳机上，伊朗永远不会抛弃其黎巴嫩兄弟姐妹。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu said Israel continues to strike Hezbollah with force, precision and determination. In Beiru, he stated that the IDF killed Ali Youssef Harashi, the personal secretary of Hezbollah Secretary‑General Naim Qassem and…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The IDF announced that they killed Maher Qassem Hamdan, commander of the alleged Hezbollah‑financed “Lebanese Companies” group in the Shebaa area of southern Lebanon, along with seven other alleged members who fled to the Sidon area. Hamdan was allegedly responsible for recruiting members, supplying weapons and budgeting the group. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列总理内塔尼亚胡表示，以色列继续以力量、精确和决心打击真主党。在贝鲁特，他声称以色列国防军击毙了真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆的个人秘书阿里·优素福·哈拉希，以及…”⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军宣布，他们在黎巴嫩南部舍巴阿地区击毙了据称由真主党资助的“黎巴嫩公司”组织的指挥官马赫尔·卡西姆·哈姆丹，以及逃往西顿地区的其他七名据称成员。哈姆丹据称负责招募成员、供应武器和组织预算。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 The Israeli military and Shin Bet announced that they have killed Abd al‑Rahman Ammar Hassan Khudri, a Palestinian Islamic Jihad member who allegedly took part in the 7th October 2023 attacks. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 以色列军方和辛贝特宣布，已击毙巴勒斯坦伊斯兰圣战组织成员阿卜杜勒-拉赫曼·阿马尔·哈桑·胡德里，据称其参与了2023年10月7日的袭击。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf just posted this on X, again. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫刚刚在X上再次发布了此消息。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 Mohammed Bagher Ghalibaf, Speaker of Iranian Parliament: “Extinguish the fire immediately”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫：“立即扑灭火焰”

text: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 The director of the Russian state nuclear corporation said Rosatom is ready for bilateral and trilateral cooperation to resolve the issue of Iran’s enriched uranium. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 俄罗斯国家核能公司负责人表示，俄罗斯国家原子能公司已准备好通过双边和三边合作解决伊朗浓缩铀问题。@wfwitness

text: Q: Do you agree that NATO countries, some of them, were tested and failed? Mark Rutte: Some of them, yes...
text_zh: 问：你是否同意一些北约国家经受了考验却失败了？马克·吕特：其中一些国家，是的...

text: 🇬🇧 UK Defense Secretary is upset about Russian submarines. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇬🇧 英国国防大臣对俄罗斯潜艇感到不满。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇵🇰 Iranian parliamentary speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf said Lebanon and the entire Resistance Axis are an inseparable part of the ceasefire, citing point one of Iran’s 10‑point proposal. He noted that Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif publicly stressed the Lebanon issue, leaving no room for denial. Ghalibaf warned that ceasefire violations carry explicit costs and will be met with strong responses. “Extinguish the fire immediately,” he said. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇵🇰 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德-巴吉尔·卡利巴夫表示，黎巴嫩及整个抵抗轴心是停火不可分割的一部分，引述了伊朗十点提案的第一点。他指出巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫公开强调了黎巴嫩问题，不容否认。卡利巴夫警告称，违反停火将带来明确代价，并将遭遇强烈回应。“立即灭火，”他说道。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah claimed further rocket attacks on Thursday in response to Israeli ceasefire violations, targeting Avivim (12:00), the Ajal hill north of Kfar Yuval (12:00), Kiryat Shmona for the fifth time (12:15), and Shomera (13:00). @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党声称周四发动了进一步火箭弹袭击，以回应以色列违反停火行为，目标包括阿维维姆（12:00）、克法尔尤瓦尔北部的阿贾尔山（12:00）、第五次袭击的基里亚特什莫纳（12:15）以及肖梅拉（13:00）。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 Lebanese President Joseph Aoun said at the start of a cabinet meeting that Lebanon is tired of statements of condemnation, and had hoped the ceasefire would include the country, but heard disappointing statements instead. He said Lebanon is conducting contacts with friends abroad to demand a ceasefire and negotiations, and to press for Lebanon to be part of the agreement. “We are a state with its own entity, and we are the ones who negotiate – we do not accept anyone else negotiating on our behalf,” he said. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩在内阁会议开始时表示，黎巴嫩已厌倦谴责声明，曾希望停火能涵盖该国，却听到令人失望的言论。他说黎巴嫩正与海外友人进行接触，要求停火与谈判，并敦促将黎巴嫩纳入协议。“我们是一个拥有自身实体的国家，由我们自己进行谈判——不接受任何其他人代表我们谈判，”他说道。@wfwitness

text: Iran's Ghalibaf: Lebanon and Iran’s allied groups are formally included in the ceasefire framework. Pakistan’s PM Shehbaz Sharif publicly reinforced that this position is firm and non-negotiable. Ceasefire violations carry explicit costs and STRONG responses. Extinguish the fire immediately.
text_zh: 伊朗卡利巴夫：黎巴嫩及伊朗盟友团体正式被纳入停火框架。巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫公开强化了这一立场，表明其坚定且不可协商。违反停火将承担明确代价和强烈回应。立即灭火。

text: 🇦🇺 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Australian PM Anthony Albanese: The Australian government also firmly believes that the ceasefire has to apply to Lebanon as well.
text_zh: 🇦🇺 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 澳大利亚总理安东尼·阿尔巴尼斯：澳大利亚政府也坚信停火必须同样适用于黎巴嫩。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Drone strikes were reported in the towns of Harouf and Deir al‑Zahrani in southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 据报道，黎巴嫩南部哈鲁夫和代尔扎赫拉尼镇遭无人机袭击。@wfwitness

text: A photo of a U.S. Navy sailor aboard the aircraft carrier USS Gerald R. Ford wearing a patch reading “Join the U.S. Navy — Save the Big Booty Venezuelans!” briefly appeared on the Pentagon’s official DVIDS platform before being deleted.
text_zh: 一张照片显示，美国海军一名水手在航空母舰杰拉尔德·R·福特号上佩戴着写有“加入美国海军——拯救大屁股委内瑞拉人！”字样的臂章，该照片短暂出现在五角大楼官方DVIDS平台后被删除。

text: A US Navy MQ-4C Triton surveillance drone suddenly turned toward Iran, squawked emergency code 7700, rapidly descended, and disappeared from public tracking over the Strait of Hormuz. An MQ-4C Triton costs more than $200 million per aircraft.
text_zh: 一架美国海军MQ-4C Triton监视无人机突然转向伊朗，发出紧急代码7700，迅速下降，随后在霍尔木兹海峡上空从公共追踪中消失。每架MQ-4C Triton的成本超过2亿美元。
